commands.review_summary:
The PR updates createRuntimeLogging to forward non-empty RuntimeLogger metadata as object-first tslog arguments and adds focused Vitest coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: RuntimeLogger accepts optional metadata, while current main's createRuntimeLogging wrappers call the underlying logger with only the message. A focused repro is a plugin/runtime logger call such as logger.info('message', { runId: 'run-1' }) and observing the adapter drops the second argument on current main.
commands.review_followup: Human review should wait on contributor-supplied real behavior proof; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair task because the patch itself looks correct.

target.title: fix: pass meta argument through RuntimeLogger methods in createRuntimeLogging
target.author: hddevteam
